title: micromeria forbesii var. forbesii
intro: Micromeria forbesii var. forbesii is a plant species commonly known as mountain savory or Crete savory, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Micromeria forbesii var. forbesii include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic agent, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Micromeria forbesii var. forbesii include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
